_comment: Package wrapper archetype (e.g. pkg_cwmscripturelinks). Bundles sub-extensions whose own releases drive versions.json + package.json elsewhere, so the wrapper itself only substitutes __DEPLOY_VERSION__ at release time. Consumers typically extend `versionTracking.substituteTokens.paths` to cover bundled libraries/ and any wrapper-owned plugins (e.g. plg_task_*).
